subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden, O My handmaiden! Verily thy Book hath been presented, and the servant standing before the Gate hath laid it forth. We answer thee through that which God hath revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امتی امتی قد حضر کتابک و عرضه العبد الحاضر لدی الباب اجبناک بما انزله الله
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Word of God is its own standard
